subject: Re: RFQ-1128 Menards AV and HDMI
body:
Subject: Re: RFQ-1128 Menards AV and HDMI

Dear Jack,

Thank you for your inquiry regarding HDMI 2.1 cables for your retail chain.

We can supply HDMI 2.1 8K cables in 2m length. Our HDMI 2.1 cables support 4K@120Hz and 8K@60Hz transmission. Your quantity of 5,000 units exceeds our standard MOQ of 500 units, which works well for your requirements.

For accurate pricing and delivery confirmation for May 2026, I need to verify a few specifications:
- Connector type preference (standard HDMI A to A?)
- Any specific certification requirements for retail
- Packaging requirements (bulk or retail packaging?)

I'll prepare a detailed quotation once I have these details and can confirm the delivery timeline with our production team.

Could you please confirm these specifications so I can provide you with an accurate quote within 24 hours?

Best regards,
[Your name]
Farreach Electronic
